task:
MuseScore 3 is already open with /home/user/Documents/piano_sketch.mscz — a single Piano part in C major 4/4 with 4 measures of 4 quarter notes each (16 notes total), no other instruments, no dynamics, no articulations.

Arrange this piano solo as a piano quartet (Piano + Violin + Viola + Violoncello), then save and export:

- Add three string instruments below the Piano so the final score has exactly 4 parts in this order: Piano, Violin, Viola, Violoncello.
- Copy the Piano melody onto the Violin staff so Violin plays the exact same 16 quarter-note pitches and rhythms as the Piano.
- Fill the Viola staff with one whole note per measure (4 whole notes total) at exactly these pitches: A3, D4, G3, C4.
- Fill the Violoncello staff with 4 quarter notes per measure (16 total) as a walking bass at exactly these pitches in order:
  - m1: C3, E3, G3, E3
  - m2: F3, A3, C4, A3
  - m3: G3, B3, D4, B3
  - m4: C3, E3, G3, C4
- Add dynamic markings at the start of each measure: m1 = mp, m2 = mf, m3 = p, m4 = f.
- Add a staccato articulation to every one of the 4 cello quarter notes in measure 4. Do not add staccato anywhere else.
- Save in place at /home/user/Documents/piano_sketch.mscz.
- Export an Uncompressed MusicXML to exactly /home/user/Documents/piano_sketch.musicxml.

After saving, the score must have exactly 4 parts (Piano, Violin, Viola, Violoncello), still 4 measures, at least 52 notes total (16 Piano + 16 Violin + 4 Viola + 16 Violoncello), the time signature still 4/4, the dynamics mp/mf/p/f present at measures 1/2/3/4, a staccato in measure 4, and exactly 4 staccato articulations in the whole score. The MusicXML export at /home/user/Documents/piano_sketch.musicxml must have exactly 4 parts.

verification.description: Exactly 4 staccato articulations in the score
